title: Too Many Ores
description: Adds all the ores you could ever need or dream of.
body:
All the ores you could ever want, need, or even dream of. Number of ores will be listed in every update that adds ores from now on. Future updates will add more ores gradually. Everything is tagged for maximum compatibility between mods. Made with MCreator.

Feel free to add this to your modpack, just redirect to here if using the mod.
Credits to 
- [https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/j7ndhm/made_some_gemstones/] for the Vanadinite texture

~~This mod is no longer being maintained unless I find more bugs.~~

I am working on the mod again from MCreator as my motivation to learn Java has been in the dumps.

Planned things ahead:

More gems, fictional materials, nether & end ores, maybe an alloy addon.
